```txt
N: 
e: 3

ciphertext (c): 
```

เป็น rsa สังเกตว่า e เล็กมากๆ เลยใช้ RsaCtfTool --attack cube_root

```bash
RsaCtfTool -n  -e 3 --decrypt  --attack cube_root

private argument is not set, the private key will not be displayed, even if recovered.

[*] Testing key /tmp/tmpxsog6ajy.
[*] Performing cube_root attack on /tmp/tmpxsog6ajy.
[+] Time elapsed: 0.0277 sec.
[+] Total time elapsed min,max,avg: 0.0277/0.0277/0.0277 sec.

Results for /tmp/tmpxsog6ajy:

Decrypted data :
HEX : 0x202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020207069636f4354467b655f7368307531645f62335f6c41726733725f39326634643561357d0a
INT (big endian) : 
INT (little endian) : 
utf-8 :                                                                                                        picoCTF{e_sh0u1d_b3_lArg3r_92f4d5a5}

utf-16 : †††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††††瀠捩䍯䙔敻獟とㅵ彤㍢江牁㍧彲㈹㑦㕤㕡੽
STR : b'                                                                                                       picoCTF{e_sh0u1d_b3_lArg3r_92f4d5a5}\n'
```
